zh.Plumpton, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾
zh.Spofforth, Harrogate Borough, North York: 英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾斯波福斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert De Plumpton III於1268年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾時，他的父親Robert de Plumpton29歲，母親Lady Isabella Westwick25歲。他於大約1295年與Lucia De Ross在英國英格蘭越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1325年在英國英格蘭越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾斯波福斯。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Plumpton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English plūme, plȳme ‘plum, plum tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, including Plumpton (Yorkshire, Northamptonshire, Sussex, Cumbria), Fieldplumpton or Woodplumpton (Lancashire), Plympton (Devon), and a lost Plumpton in Kingsbury (Warwicks).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert De Plumpton III was born in 1268, in Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Plumpton, was 29 and his mother, Lady Isabella Westwick, was 25. He married Lucia De Ross about 1295, in Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1325, in Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57, and was buried in Spofforth, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Plumpton, Yorkshire, England: Plumpton by Ecclesall, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert De Plumpton III est né en 1268, à Plumpton by Ecclesall, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Plumpton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabella Westwick, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lucia De Ross environ 1295, à Plumpton by Ecclesall, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1325, à Plumpton by Ecclesall, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Spofforth, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat um 1295 in Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Lucia De Ross geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1325 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Spofforth, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert De Plumpton IIIが1268年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアプルンプトン ビー エククレサルで生まれた時，父Robert de Plumptonは29歳，母Lady Isabella Westwickは25歳であった。約1295年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアプルンプトン ビー エククレサルでLucia De Rossと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1325年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアプルンプトン ビー エククレサルで57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアスプオフォースにて埋葬された。

ko.Plumpton, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 c클사
ko.lifeSummary: Robert De Plumpton III(이)가 1268년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 c클사에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Plumpton(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Isabella Westwick(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 c클사에서 Lucia De Ross(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 c클사에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 스포포스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert De Plumpton III nasceu em 1268, em Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Plumpton, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabella Westwick, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucia De Ross aproximadamente 1295, em Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1325, em Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Spofforth, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Plumpton, Yorkshire, England: плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert De Plumpton III родился в 1268 г. в местности плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Plumpton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabella Westwick, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucia De Ross около 1295 г. в местности плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1325 г. в местности плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности споффорт, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Lucia De Ross aproximadamente 1295, en Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1325, en Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Spofforth, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
